title: The Very Last Entry: We're Getting a Pet Rat

sentences.en: William announced today that he wants a pet rat for summer, and shockingly, Mom did not say no immediately, which surprised all of us.
sentences.zh: William 今天宣布他暑假想要一隻寵物鼠，令人震驚的是，媽媽居然沒有立刻說不，這讓我們大家都很意外。

sentences.en: The hot weather has clearly affected everyone's mood this week, and even Mom seemed a little more liberal about saying yes to new pets than usual.
sentences.zh: 這星期的炎熱天氣顯然影響了大家的心情，就連媽媽對答應養新寵物這件事，似乎都比平常寬鬆一點。

sentences.en: We took a bus to the pet shop, and the motion of the ride made William a little sleepy despite his excitement.
sentences.zh: 我們搭公車去寵物店，雖然 William 很興奮，但一路的搖晃還是讓他有點想睡。

sentences.en: At the shop, we had to fill out a small form asking whether we wanted a male or female rat, and William checked "female" without hesitation.
sentences.zh: 在店裡，我們得填一張小表格，問我們想要公鼠還是母鼠，William 毫不猶豫就勾了「母的」。

sentences.en: He said, in his own words, he preferred a lady rat, since Perry and William are already enough male chaos for one household.
sentences.zh: 他用自己的話說，他比較想要一隻女生老鼠，因為 Perry 跟 William 兩個公的在家裡搗蛋已經夠多了。

sentences.en: The shop owner, a kind woman named Ms. Tan, said only a small minority of customers ever ask for a pet rat instead of a hamster.
sentences.zh: 店主是一位親切的女士，Tan 女士，她說只有一小部分的客人會來要老鼠，而不是要倉鼠。

sentences.en: She said the rat looked a little fat, but that was simply because the shop feeds every animal on a generous daily basis.
sentences.zh: 她說那隻老鼠看起來有點胖，但那只是因為店裡每天都很大方地餵食每一隻動物。

sentences.en: William picked her up carefully, and the rat's tiny foot immediately grabbed onto his finger, which made him laugh out loud.
sentences.zh: William 小心翼翼地把牠抱起來，那隻老鼠小小的腳立刻抓住了他的手指，這讓他大笑出聲。

sentences.en: The price was only a few dollars and some cents, which Mom said was surprisingly cheap for how much joy it clearly brought William.
sentences.zh: 價格只要幾塊錢加上一點零錢，媽媽說以牠帶給 William 這麼多快樂來看，這價格便宜得讓人驚訝。

sentences.en: On the way out, we passed a drugstore, and Sophia went in quickly to buy some cream for a small cut on her lip.
sentences.zh: 出來的路上，我們經過一間藥局，Sophia 快速進去買了一點藥膏，要擦她嘴唇上一個小小的傷口。

sentences.en: While we waited outside, Bernice told us a story from the news about a thief who tried to steal bicycles near the old town gate, but got caught immediately.
sentences.zh: 我們在外面等的時候，Bernice 跟我們說了一則新聞，一個小偷想在老城門附近偷腳踏車，結果馬上就被抓到了。

sentences.en: William, holding his new rat, said no thief would ever dare steal a pet rat, since apparently nobody wants a rodent that badly.
sentences.zh: 抱著新老鼠的 William 說，絕對不會有小偷想偷一隻寵物鼠的，因為顯然沒有人會那麼想要一隻齧齒動物。

sentences.en: Back home, we planted a small seed in the garden as a kind of celebration, watching its future roots begin somewhere under the soil.
sentences.zh: 回到家，我們在花園裡種了一顆小種子，算是一種小小的慶祝，看著它未來的根開始在土壤下方生長。

sentences.en: William named his new rat "Notebook," saying it seemed fair, since this whole diary basically started because of a notebook too.
sentences.zh: William 幫他的新老鼠取名叫「筆記本」，他說這樣很公平，畢竟這整本日記說到底也是因為一本筆記本才開始的。

sentences.en: It has been an entire school year since Bernice first said "diary" sounded childish, and I still find that a little funny to think about.
sentences.zh: 距離 Bernice 第一次說「diary」聽起來很幼稚，已經過了整整一個學年，我現在想起來還是覺得有點好笑。

sentences.en: Thus, this is the last entry of my very first diary, and I plan to keep writing, in one notebook or another, till there is nothing left to say.
sentences.zh: 所以，這就是我人生第一本日記的最後一篇，而我打算繼續寫下去，不管是這本還是下一本筆記本，一直寫到再也沒什麼好說的為止。

sentences.en: It has genuinely been a pleasure, dear notebook, and I have a strong feeling this is not actually the end.
sentences.zh: 親愛的筆記本，這真的是一段很愉快的旅程，而我強烈感覺這其實根本不是結束。

quiz.question: What pet does William get at the end of the school year?
What does William name his new rat?
According to Coco's final entry, what does she plan to do?
options: Keep writing in a notebook until there is nothing left to say.
